Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Nanotwinned precipitates induced ultra-strong AlCoCrFeNi_{2.1} eutectic high-entropy alloy through additive manufacturing

Composition_Info.Note: Powder: 15-53 μm, avg 31.5 μm (LangFeng Material Technology). Measured composition is B2 phase composition from APT/EDS analysis. As-built sample composition listed in Table S1.

Process_Text.original: Gas-atomized AlCoCrFeNi2.1 powder (15-53 μm, avg 31.5 μm, LangFeng Material Technology). PBF-LB using EOS M100 (200 W fiber laser, 40 μm spot). Parameters: P=100 W, v=1000 mm/s, hatch=50 μm, layer=20 μm, no preheating, high-purity Ar (<1000 ppm O2), 67° rotation between layers. Printed plates: 40×8×4 mm. Relative density >99%.
Process_Text.simplified: PBF-LB (EOS M100, 100 W, 1000 mm/s, 50 μm hatch, 20 μm layer, Ar atmosphere, no preheating)

Process_Info.Equipment: EOS M100 Laser-sintering system (200 W fiber laser)

Microstructure_Text.original: Dual-phase hierarchical microstructure with nano-lamellar and cellular eutectic colonies. B2-dominant (83.6 vol%) with minor FCC (16.4 vol%). K-S orientation relationship between FCC and B2 phases. Spinodal decomposition observed within B2 colonies showing biconinuous Ni-Al-rich and Co-Cr-Fe-rich nanostructures. High density of dislocations from rapid solidification. No precipitates in as-built condition.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: B2-dominant (83.6%) dual-phase microstructure with nano-lamellar (FCC 87 nm/B2 160 nm) and cellular (B2 800 nm/FCC shell 14 nm) colonies; K-S orientation relationship; spinodal decomposition in B2; high dislocation density; no precipitates

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut
Properties_Info.Note: High strength attributed to B2-dominant microstructure (83.6%)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut
Properties_Info.Note: Reduced ductility compared to other AM AlCoCrFeNi2.1 EHEAs due to higher B2 volume fraction
High hardness consistent with B2-dominant EHEA

Composition_Info.Note: Measured composition is for NT FCC nanoprecipitates (CoCrFeNiAl0.1 equivalent). B2 matrix composition: Al15.9Co16.9Cr15.7Fe16.8Ni34.7. Annealing at 600°C for 8h followed by water quenching.

Process_Info.Process_Category: Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) + Heat Treatment

Process_Text.original: Gas-atomized AlCoCrFeNi2.1 powder (15-53 μm, avg 31.5 μm, LangFeng Material Technology). PBF-LB using EOS M100 (200 W fiber laser, 40 μm spot). Parameters: P=100 W, v=1000 mm/s, hatch=50 μm, layer=20 μm, no preheating, high-purity Ar (<1000 ppm O2), 67° rotation between layers. Post-heat treatment: 600°C for 8 h, water quenching (muffle furnace).
Process_Text.simplified: PBF-LB (EOS M100, 100 W, 1000 mm/s, 50 μm hatch, 20 μm layer, Ar) + Annealing 600°C for 8h, water quench

Microstructure_Text.original: Multiple-order hierarchical multiphase architecture after annealing at 600°C for 8h. B2-dominant with high-density needle-like nanoprecipitates (~180 nm length, ~20 nm diameter). Two precipitate types: Type I - FCC with ultrafine nanotwins (avg 2.4 nm twin thickness, 0.4-16 nm range); Type II - HCP with stacking faults (avg 1.1 nm SF spacing, 0.4-2.9 nm range). 76% FCC-type, 24% HCP-type/hybrid. L12 precipitates in FCC phase. Volume fractions: 20% in lamellar colonies, 45% in cellular colonies. NT precipitates are CoCrFeNiAl0.1 equivalent. Semi-coherent interfaces with B2 matrix following K-S (FCC-B2) and Burgers (HCP-B2) orientation relationships.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: B2 matrix with high-density NT FCC nanoprecipitates (76%, ~180×20 nm, 2.4 nm twins) and minor HCP precipitates (24%, 1.1 nm SFs); L12 in FCC; 20-45 vol% precipitates; semi-coherent interfaces

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut
Properties_Info.Note: ~335 MPa increment from as-built; NT precipitate strengthening contributes ~565 MPa

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut
Properties_Info.Note: ~24% higher than as-built; highest reported for additively manufactured HEAs

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 600°C; strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut
Properties_Info.Note: Exceptional strength at intermediate temperature; surpasses most AM and conventional alloys

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut
Properties_Info.Note: Maintained similar ductility to as-built due to reduced dislocation strengthening offsetting precipitation hardening

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 600°C; strain rate 1e-3 s-1; perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8, gauge 8×2×1 mm, EDM cut

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Calculated strengthening contribution from Orowan bowing mechanism
Properties_Info.Note: Dominant strengthening mechanism; slightly exceeds total yield strength increment (~335 MPa) due to reduction in dislocation strengthening
